title: Death at the Faucet: The Untold Story
original_title: Death at the Faucet: The Untold Story
overview: In the heart of the American South, a city steeped in history finds itself at the epicenter of a modern crisis. Jackson, Mississippi – a community where echoes of the civil rights movement still resonate – faces a struggle not just for justice, but for the most basic necessity of life: water.
